bad_ingredients.note: Heavy dairy fat — use yogurt or skip

suggestions: Cook with extra-virgin olive oil instead of butter/cream.
Drop or greatly reduce cured/processed meat; use it as a small accent at most.
Add extra-virgin olive oil as the main fat.
Add legumes (chickpeas, lentils, beans) to boost the Mediterranean profile.

recipes.name: Bacon & Boursin Madeleines
recipes.comment: Not Mediterranean — save for rare indulgences. Builds on nuts/seeds. Held back by cured/processed meat, butter/cream, refined grains. It is a sweet/dessert, inherently a "top of the pyramid" food.
suggestions: Cook with extra-virgin olive oil instead of butter/cream.
Swap refined grains for whole grains (brown rice, whole-wheat, bulgur).
Drop or greatly reduce cured/processed meat; use it as a small accent at most.
